---
title: "ranfor_pred_interactive"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-28"
---

```{r}
# --- Packages ---
library(tidyverse)
library(ggiraph)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)
library(readr)
```

```{r}

# --- Inputs ---
percent_identity <- 40
probs_csv <- "/Volumes/T7 Shield/random_forest_chpc/known_peptides_rf_probs_predictions_70.csv"
pos_csv   <- "../../data/concept_groups/sequences/group_2/training/group_2_positive_known_peps.csv"

# --- Load predictions & clean column names ---
activations_df <- readr::read_csv(probs_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  { names(.) <- gsub("\\s+", "", trimws(names(.))); . } %>%  # remove stray spaces in headers
  transmute(
    Entry       = as.character(Entry),
    position    = as.integer(position),
    residue     = as.character(residue),
    pred_prob   = as.numeric(pred_prob),
    pred_label  = as.integer(pred_label)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Entry, position)

# --- Load positives (optional; for overlays) ---
pos_domains_df <- readr::read_csv(pos_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  { names(.) <- gsub("\\s+", "", trimws(names(.))); . } %>%
  transmute(
    Entry          = as.character(Entry),
    residue        = as.character(residue),
    residue_number = as.integer(residue_number)
  )
```

```{r}
# --- Prep annotations ---
# Expecting a data frame `known_peptide_annotations` with columns:
#   - Entry
#   - Protein.names  (your note says this exact column exists)
# We’ll keep things robust in case of different capitalization.
stopifnot(exists("known_peptide_annotations"))

annotations_df <- known_peptide_annotations %>%
  mutate(
    Entry         = as.character(Entry),
    protein_names = coalesce(
      .data[["Protein.names"]],
      NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Entry, protein_names) %>%
  distinct()

# Helper for safe tooltip text
tooltip_for_entry <- function(entry_id) {
  row <- annotations_df %>% filter(Entry == entry_id) %>% slice(1)
  if (nrow(row) == 0) {
    glue("Entry: {entry_id}\nProtein name: —")
  } else {
    glue("Entry: {entry_id}\nProtein name: {row$protein_names %||% '—'}")
  }
}

# `%||%` helper (avoid rlang dependency)
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || is.na(x)) y else x
```

```{r}
# --- Interactive plot function for one Entry ---
make_profile_girafe <- function(entry_id) {
  df_e <- activations_df %>%
    filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
    arrange(position)

  if (nrow(df_e) == 0) {
    stop(glue("No data found for Entry = {entry_id}"))
  }

  seq_len <- max(df_e$position, na.rm = TRUE)
  # determine y-range from pred_prob (0/1 with NA for blanks)
  y_max <- suppressWarnings(max(df_e$pred_prob, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(y_max)) y_max <- 1
  y_lim  <- if (y_max <= 0) 1 else max(1, y_max) * 1.2
  tick_h <- y_lim * 0.09

  # Cleavage site boxes (from positives)
  clefts <- pos_domains_df %>%
    filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
    distinct(residue_number, residue) %>%
    arrange(residue_number)

  # Tooltip title from annotations
  tooltip_title <- tooltip_for_entry(entry_id)

  rects <- tibble(
    xmin = clefts$residue_number - 0.5,
    xmax = clefts$residue_number + 0.5,
    ymin = -tick_h,
    ymax =  y_lim
  )

  # Hover strips under the baseline for each position
  hover_strips <- df_e %>%
    transmute(
      xmin    = position - 0.5,
      xmax    = position + 0.5,
      ymin    = -tick_h,
      ymax    = 0,
      tooltip = glue("Position: {position}\nResidue:  {residue}"),
      data_id = paste0(Entry, "_", position)
    )

  # X-axis spacing by sequence length
  x_by <- dplyr::case_when(
    seq_len > 500 ~ 50L,
    seq_len > 350 ~ 40L,
    seq_len > 100 ~ 20L,
    TRUE          ~ 10L
  )
  x_breaks <- seq(0, seq_len, by = x_by)

  p <- ggplot() +
    # Interactive title
    geom_text_interactive(
      data = tibble(
        x       = (seq_len + 1) / 10,
        y       = y_lim * 1.08,
        label   = paste0(entry_id),
        tooltip = tooltip_title,
        data_id = entry_id
      ),
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, tooltip = tooltip, data_id = data_id),
      size = 4,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +

    # Cleavage-site highlight boxes
    geom_rect_interactive(
      data = rects,
      aes(
        xmin    = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax,
        tooltip = "Cleavage site", data_id = xmin
      ),
      fill  = "#39FF14",
      color = "gray70",
      size  = 0.1,
      alpha = 0.5,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +

    # Invisible hover strips along baseline
    geom_rect_interactive(
      data = hover_strips,
      aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax,
          tooltip = tooltip, data_id = data_id),
      fill  = "transparent",
      color = NA,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +

    # Bars: prediction (0/1). NA for 0 = blank column
    geom_col_interactive(
      data = df_e,
      aes(
        x       = position,
        y       = pred_prob,
        tooltip = glue(
          "Position: {position}\n",
          "Residue:  {residue}\n",
          "Prediction: {ifelse(is.na(pred_prob), 0, 1)}"
        ),
        data_id = paste0(Entry, "_", position)
      ),
      fill  = "steelblue",
      color = "gray40",
      size  = 0.1,
      width = 1,
      alpha = 0.7
    ) +

    # Minor tick marks on x
    geom_segment(
      data = tibble(
        x    = seq(0.5, seq_len + 0.5, by = 1),
        xend = seq(0.5, seq_len + 0.5, by = 1),
        y    = 0,
        yend = -tick_h * 0.9
      ),
      aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
      color = "gray40",
      size  = 0.2,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +

    # Optional reference line at 0.5 (still useful visually)
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "maroon", size = 0.2) +

    # Baseline and residue labels under cleavage boxes
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
    geom_text(
      data = clefts,
      aes(x = residue_number, y = -tick_h * 0.6, label = residue),
      size = 2.5,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +

    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = x_breaks,
      limits = c(0.5, seq_len + 0.5),
      expand = expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1),
    limits = c(-tick_h, max(1, y_lim) * 1.25),  # <-- was max(1, y_lim)
    expand = expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(
      x = "Residue Position",
      y = "Prediction (0/1)"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.margin        = margin(t = 40, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10),
      panel.grid.major   = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y        = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.x       = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.y       = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.text.x        = element_text(color = "black", margin = margin(t = 4)),
      axis.text.y        = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.title.x       = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6)),
      axis.title.y       = element_text(margin = margin(r = 6)),
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )

  girafe(
    ggobj      = p,
    width_svg  = 11,
    height_svg = 5,
    options    = list(
      opts_hover(css = "fill-opacity:1;cursor:pointer;")
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}

# --- Which entries to plot? ---
entries_for_plot <- sort(unique(activations_df$Entry))
# Or pick a subset, e.g.:
# entries_for_plot <- c("P01178","P01275")

# --- Build widgets & save one HTML page ---
widgets <- purrr::map(entries_for_plot, make_profile_girafe)

spaced_widgets <- lapply(widgets, function(w) {
  tags$div(style = "margin: 50px 20px;", w)
})

all_page <- tagList(lapply(spaced_widgets, function(w) list(w, htmltools::br())))

html_out <- file.path("../../figures/known_peptides_predictions_ranfor.html")
htmltools::save_html(all_page, html_out)
cat("✔ Saved interactive profiles to:", html_out, "\n")
```
